fields.title: ThreadCatalog Effect service for session indexing
fields.description: Create the core ThreadCatalog Effect service that provides cached session cataloging and indexing capabilities for thread search and read operations.
fields.design: Implement ThreadCatalog service in extensions/tau/src/thread/service.ts using Effect.Context.Tag pattern. Service should provide: find() for searching sessions by query with scoring, read() for retrieving session content with optional goal filtering, and internal cache management with mtime-based invalidation. Use SessionManager.list() and SessionManager.open() from @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent for file access. Cache catalog records in memory keyed by path and mtime. Parse session entries to extract searchable content: session names, user messages, assistant text, tool results.
